title: Avenastrum mongolicum
taxonomy: Avenastrum mongolicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is commonly known as the Mongolian oat grass. The classification of Avenastrum mongolicum includes being a member of the genus Avenastrum. This genus is part of the subfamily Pooideae and belongs to the family Poaceae. As a member of the family Poaceae, Avenastrum mongolicum is related to other grasses and wild oats.
